purpose: P31/P279 -> CK-UFO typing crosswalk + rules for the SCALE-1 S1 Wikidata domain-balance leg, and the exact-external-ID decontamination spec against the existing 207,733-cluster union. This is a DESIGN/TABLE artifact ($0, no ingest). The Wikidata source is NOT yet local; the heavy dump ingest is scoped-not-run (see docs/next/design/scale-s1-wikidata-domain-balance-plan.md).
epistemic_status: The P279 (subclass-of) chain IS source-asserted structure (cascade step 1, like OBO is_a). Each terminal ROOT->UFO label below is STIPULATED (ontology-grounded), reported separately from any source-asserted chain, and audited by the design 4.3 stratified human sample (Wikidata gets its own stratum). Root Q-ids are stable Wikidata items; per-root class counts are MEASURED (poc/scale/results/wdqs-counts.json, 2026-07-13, live snapshot). NO feasibility conclusion.

concept_membership_rule.counts_as_type_level_concept_if: item has >=1 outgoing P279 (subclass of) statement OR is the value of P31 for >=K instances (a 'type used as a type'), K STIPULATED at build time (proposed K=1 for a class that itself has P279 ancestry; K>=25 for a bare P31 target with no P279).
concept_membership_rule.excluded_named_individual_if: item appears only as the SUBJECT of P31 and has no P279 backbone (e.g. a specific person/place/work/organism specimen). Named individuals belong in the world ABox (design 0) and do NOT count toward the concept headline.
concept_membership_rule.rationale: Mirrors the OBO 'kind:class' filter and design 3.5 'type-level clusters, not named individuals'. Taxa (P31 wd:Q16521 subject) are overwhelmingly individuals -> excluded, consistent with the 627,783 P685-linked items being mostly non-concepts.

denotation_level_rule.individual: P31 to a non-metaclass value AND no P279 backbone -> denotation_level=individual (EXCLUDED from concept count).
denotation_level_rule.type: P279 backbone present -> denotation_level=type (source-asserted-structural via the P279 chain).
denotation_level_rule.metaclass_guard: if P31 value is itself a metaclass (P31 wd:Q19478619 metaclass, or wd:Q23958852 variable-order class), the item may still be a type; do not down-rank to individual.

root_to_ufo.label: physical object
root_to_ufo.rationale: physical object -> UFO substantial/object; kind by default.

root_to_ufo.label: profession/occupation
root_to_ufo.rationale: an occupation is a role a person plays (anti-rigid) -> UFO role-mixin/role. Identity provider = the person; role is externally dependent.

root_to_ufo.label: position
root_to_ufo.rationale: a position/post is a role; anti-rigid.

root_to_ufo.label: geographic location type
root_to_ufo.rationale: geographic feature TYPE -> region/place kind (the individual places are ABox).

cascade_steps.step2_crosswalk: root_to_ufo terminal label when P279* reaches a listed root (ontology-grounded, STIPULATED terminal, reported separately).
cascade_steps.step3_soft: P1963 (properties for this type) and Wikidata constraint statements -> SOFT selectional candidates ONLY; never compiled to hard rdfs:domain/range (design 4.2).
cascade_steps.step5_underdetermined: default when no root is reached; preserved as underdetermined, never fabricated (design 11).

decontamination_against_union.principle: EXACT identifier join, not fuzzy match. A Wikidata item that carries an external ID resolving to an existing local record is a CROSSWALK MERGE (adds provenance/possibly a UFO commitment to the existing record; does NOT add a new concept).

id_joins.name: ChEBI ID
id_joins.action: merge; note only 41 local so ~all are new chemistry (added, not merged-away)

id_joins.name: NCBI taxon ID
id_joins.action: merge taxa; most are individuals excluded by membership rule

decontamination_against_union.measured_collision_bound: Of a ~100k non-bio target slice, only the ~17,374 P8814(WordNet)+P279 classes can collide with our union via the cross-domain lever; the bio IDs (ChEBI/MONDO/UBERON/CL) cover the bio layer we already have. So the NET NEW non-bio concept yield after decontamination is large (~80k+ of a 100k slice are genuinely new) — the domain-balance headroom. [MEASURED intersections, poc/scale/results/wdqs-counts.json]
decontamination_against_union.output: enables the first real design 3.5 'exactly_crosswalked_clusters' count (currently NOT COMPUTED in scale-s1-census.json).

provenance.root_qids: stable Wikidata items; verified reachable via WDQS this tick for the counted roots
